title: 266. Trötta konsumenter, pigga väktare
summary_md:
# 266. Trötta konsumenter, pigga väktare

**Feed**: aktiepodden  
**Published**: 2026-06-12  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

Episode 266 takes a cautious top-down view: ECB and Fed rate-hike narratives are strengthening on hot US jobs and inflation data, oil is up ~55-60% on the prolonged Iran/Hormuz conflict, and spillover (contagion) effects are starting to bleed into the broader economy. The hosts flag a high-concentration, AI-driven equity market they consider over-valued and welcome a correction, while noting bright spots in green energy and biotech (Allsecure's GSK Alzheimer deal). Stock picks lean defensive/idiosyncratic: a cautious read on low-price retail (Rusta, Clas Ohlson), and constructive theses on Octave (Hexagon spin-off software) and Securitas (margin expansion).

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟢 SECU-B — Securitas | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 70%

Stanley acquisition lifting tech mix (~1/3 of business), margins rising ~0.5pp/year toward 10% target, conjuncture-neutral demand, ~3-3.5% yield.

#### Reasoning

Hated Stanley acquisition is now paying off: higher-margin tech products are ~1/3 of revenue, driving steady ~0.5pp annual operating-margin gains. Heavy restructuring is done and focus shifts to growth, especially tech, with bolt-on M&A resuming. Security demand is largely conjuncture-neutral, so management controls its own earnings trajectory. June capital markets day could be a catalyst; ~3-3.5% dividend yield adds support.

#### Sell Triggers

- if margin expansion toward 10% stalls
- if tech-segment growth disappoints
- if a severe downturn pressures legacy guarding pricing

> *"Nej, men jag gillar Securitas."*

---

### 🟡 RUSTA — Rusta | **HOLD** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 45%

Soft organic growth (~4.5-5.8%) worried the market and stock fell, but strong gross margin, FX tailwind ahead and first non-loss Q4 support the case.

#### Reasoning

Picked as the 'least worst' of the low-price retailers. Growth slowed against tough ~15% comps and the bow is tightly drawn on the whole low-price segment, raising backlash risk if more reports miss. However the gross margin was very strong, FX headwind peaked in Q1 and turns to a tailwind, and store-opening pipeline plus pricing power offer margin upside. Net: a hold leaning on margins rather than top-line momentum.

#### Sell Triggers

- if organic growth keeps slowing as households normalize spending
- if low-price retail loyalty fades in better economy
- if FX tailwind fails to materialize

> *"Den som kittlar minst minst. Ja, minst minst. Det kanske är Rusta."*

---

### 🟡 CLAS-B — Clas Ohlson | **HOLD** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 45%

Raised operating margin target to 12% (confidence signal), but record profitability is questioned for durability and top-line growth (~9%) underwhelms.

#### Reasoning

The hike of the operating-margin target to 12% signals management confidence and is hard to walk back, a modest positive. But the stock has rallied hard on these expectations, profitability is at historic highs whose durability is uncertain, and growth disappointed like peers. Hosts prefer other consumer names (New Wave, Revolution Race) with stronger metrics and lower multiples. Net neutral hold pending proof the higher margin holds.

#### Sell Triggers

- if the new 12% margin target proves unsustainable
- if growth continues to undershoot expectations
- if the stock's premium valuation compresses

> *"Härom veckan så höjde man ju faktiskt marginalmålet. Till just 12%. Kommer det hålla?"*

---

### 🟢 NEWA-B — New Wave | **BUY** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 50%

Host's preferred consumer name with stronger metrics and lower multiples than Rusta/Clas Ohlson, though past margin-target hike preceded a decline.

#### Reasoning

Cited as a preferred alternative within consumer discretionary, with stronger fundamentals and in many cases lower multiples than the low-price retailers. The host tempers enthusiasm with a cautionary anecdote: New Wave's 2022 capital-markets-day margin-target hike to 20% was followed by a downturn, a reminder to watch for over-extension. Constructive but modest conviction.

#### Sell Triggers

- if margin targets prove over-stretched as in the past
- if consumer demand weakens materially

> *"Jag föredrar andra konsumentaktier, typ New Wave, Revolution Race."*

---

### 🟢 RVRC — Revolution Race | **BUY** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 50%

Named alongside New Wave as a preferred consumer holding with stronger metrics and lower multiples than Rusta and Clas Ohlson.

#### Reasoning

Mentioned as a favored consumer-discretionary pick over the low-price retailers, justified by stronger metrics and lower valuation multiples. Only briefly discussed, so conviction is modest, but the directional lean is clearly constructive relative to peers under scrutiny.

#### Sell Triggers

- if growth or margins deteriorate
- if consumer spending pulls back

> *"Jag föredrar andra konsumentaktier, typ New Wave, Revolution Race."*

---
